## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project coding rules (small, composable modules; minimal dependencies).
- [ ] This change does **not** add Astro-specific code unless the work is entirely within `/legacy/`.
- [ ] Secrets and credentials are **not** committed; environment bindings are used instead.
- [ ] README and/or relevant docs are updated if behaviour or structure changed.
- [ ] Cloudflare bindings (KV / D1 / R2) introduced by this PR are wrapped in a data-access layer.
